message: Given my costs, I expect a price of at least 70 for a trade.
Open to repeated trades, but my budget caps around mid-60s. If you can ask 62–64, I’ll bid accordingly to clear near 64–66. Above 68 I’ll skip.
I’m capped at 66 and will skip any higher. If you ask 64, I’ll keep bidding 66 so we clear 65 each round.
I agree to ask 64 if you bid 66. Let's trade at 65 each round.
Prefer ask 63/bid 65 to clear 64 each round; otherwise we can continue at 64/66.
Let's continue with ask 64 and bid 66 to clear at 65.
Let's stick with ask 64 and bid 66 to clear at 65 each round.
Agreed. Keep ask 64 and I’ll bid 66 to clear 65 each round.
Let’s lock 64 ask / 66 bid through round 20—automatic trades at 65 each round. If you keep 64, I’ll keep 66.
Agreed. I will ask 64 each round. You bid 66, and we clear at 65.
From now I’ll only bid 65. Ask 63 so we clear at 64 each round. If you keep 64, I may skip occasionally. Prefer steady trades; confirm 63/65?
Confirmed. I will ask 63 each round. You bid 65, and we clear at 64 steadily.
Let's lock 62 ask and my 64 bid for all remaining rounds, steady trades at 63. If not, I'll cut to 63 or skip. Confirm?
Let's continue with ask 63 and your bid 65 for steady trades at 64. I cannot go lower.
Let's revert to round 6 agreement: I ask 63, you bid 65, clear at 64. Steady trades benefit both.
I will only bid 63 for the rest of the game. Ask 63 and we trade at 63 every round; any ask above 63 and I skip.
I agree to ask 63 each round. Let's trade steadily at 63.
Agreed: I will bid 63 each round. Keep ask 63 and we trade at 63 every time. If you later can do 62, tell me and I’ll match 62; otherwise we lock 63/63 through round 20.
Sticking with bid 63 every round. Any ask above 63 gets no trade. If you can do 62 later, tell me; otherwise we keep 63/63 through round 20.
Agreed. I will ask 63 each round for steady trades.
I will ask 63 each round as agreed. Let's trade steadily.
Any chance you can do ask 62 from now on? I’ll bid 62 every round and never skip. If not, I’ll keep 63/63 steady.
Continuing bid 63 through round 20. Keep ask 63 and we trade every round; any ask above 63 and I skip. If you can do 62 later, I'll match.
I will ask 63 each round as agreed for steady trades.
I will ask 63 each round as agreed for steady trades.
Sticking with bid 63 every round. If you can do ask 62 at any point, I’ll match 62 and never skip; otherwise we continue 63/63 through round 20.
Continuing bid 63 each round. Any ask above 63 means no trade. If you can ask 62 from now on, I’ll match 62 and never push lower; otherwise we keep 63/63 steady through round 20.
I will ask 63 each round for steady trades.
I will ask 63 each round for steady trades.
Any chance you can ask 62 this round? I’ll bid 62 and hold there, never push below; otherwise we continue 63/63 unchanged through round 20.
I will ask 63 each round for steady trades as agreed.
Continuing bid 63 every round. Any ask above 63 gets no trade. If you can do 62 anytime, I’ll match that round; otherwise we keep 63/63 through 20.
I will ask 63 each round for steady trades.
Continuing bid 63 each round for guaranteed trades. If you can do ask 62 in any remaining round, I’ll match 62 and hold there, never push lower; otherwise we keep 63/63.
Keeping bid 63 for rounds 18–20 for guaranteed trades. If you ever ask 62 in any remaining round, I’ll match 62 that round and keep 63 otherwise. Your call.
I will ask 63 each round for steady trades in rounds 18-20.
I will ask 63 in rounds 19 and 20 for steady trades.
Confirmed: I will bid 63 in rounds 19 and 20. If you ask 62 in either round, I’ll match 62 that round; otherwise 63/63 as agreed.
I will ask 63 for the final round.
Final round: If you ask 62, I bid 62. Otherwise I bid 63 for 63/63 as usual. Your call.
